name: NEWS CORP
summary: PART I OVERVIEW The Company News Corporation (the Company, News Corp, we, us, or our) is a global, diversified media and information services company focused on creating and distributing authoritative and engaging content and other products and services to consumers and businesses throughout the world.The Company comprises businesses across a range of media, including information services and news, digital real estate services and book publishing, that are distributed under some of the worlds mo...
